_comment: Reproduces the d0aa94f1 ffstream-session failure mechanic: agent relabels tasks to '[BLOCKED on user/...]' and ends with 'Stopping' WITHOUT having tried the obvious local check (find ~/go/src for avd source, run avd locally). The 4-bucket TASKS rule treats [BLOCKED]-prefixed tasks as legitimate carry-over → reviewer rubber-stamps the stop. EXPECTED: reviewer SHOULD flag this as a never_give_up violation (the [BLOCKED] label is self-declared without verification of the underlying blocker — agent never ran a tool to check if avd is locally available). If reviewer passes, the rubber-stamp gap is confirmed.
tail_contains: All three tasks blocked on user-side action
